Computation of bootstrap confidence intervals in an almost automatic
fashion as described in Efron and Narasimhan (2020,
\<[doi:10.1080/10618600.2020.1714633](https://doi.org/10.1080/10618600.2020.1714633)\>).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bcaboot-package`](bcaboot.md) [`bcaboot`](bcaboot.md) : Automatic
  Construction of Bootstrap Confidence Intervals
- [`bcajack()`](bcajack.md) : Nonparametric bias-corrected and
  accelerated bootstrap confidence limits
- [`bcajack2()`](bcajack2.md) : Nonparametric bias-corrected and
  accelerated bootstrap confidence limits
- [`bcanon()`](bcanon.md) : Compute nonparametric BCa bootstrap
  confidence intervals
- [`bcapar()`](bcapar.md) : Compute parametric bootstrap confidence
  intervals
- [`bcaplot()`](bcaplot.md) : Plots of bca confidence limits
- [`diabetes`](diabetes.md) : Blood and other measurements in diabetics

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Automatic Construction of Bootstrap Confidence
  Intervals](bcaboot.md):
